title: Exclusive: Berry Bros. chief executive Emma Fox to step down
summary: Berry Bros. & Rudd chief executive Emma Fox will leave the business later this summer after six years leading the historic wine and spirits merchant. The company has appointed chief financial officer Emily Rae and UK managing director Rob Symington as co-chief executives as it prepares for its next phase of international growth.
content: Berry Bros. & Rudd chief executive Emma Fox will leave the business later this summer after six years leading the historic wine and spirits merchant. The company has appointed chief financial officer Emily Rae and UK managing director Rob Symington as co-chief executives as it prepares for its next phase of international growth.
